strengths: 20+ years engineering with deep distributed-systems expertise; millions of RPS at Dunnhumby, real-time systems, event-driven architecture
Current AI infrastructure work (MCP, agent tooling) demonstrates emerging agentic-AI capability
Full-stack capability across multiple languages with emphasis on code quality, testing, and mentorship
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership; resume shows IC/staff roles, not CTO/VP/Head of Eng managing 10-30+ teams
Limited multi-agent AI production systems track record; current role touches infrastructure but lacks proven deployment at scale
No fintech or regulated-environment experience; background is open-source, media, and advertising tech
response.justification: Skilled, versatile engineer with 20+ years experience and strong distributed-systems fundamentals. However, the resume lacks three critical hard requirements for this CTO role: no demonstrated executive leadership or team scaling (current roles are senior IC/staff), no production multi-agent AI systems track record despite emerging infrastructure work, and no fintech or compliance background needed to lead a financial-infrastructure company. While technical depth could support a principal architect or senior engineering role, he is significantly underqualified for executive CTO leadership.
